title: not the potato update now is it
description: I don't really like potatoes so instead, I changed some of the textures to carrots.
body:
# ~~Poisonous Potato Update~~ Carrot Update
![The Update Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17054ba066d481ed8e234544f0c2e3b8d575eb0f.png)
**Minecraft Potatoes suck (in my opinion) and I think carrots deserve the spot in this years april fools update. So thats why I changed some of the potato textures to carrots..!**
